title: Invalid string length error during workflow execution
symptom: The workflow fails with a 'RangeError: Invalid string length' after processing a large CSV file. This occurs when trying to finalize the workflow after reading all data.
root_cause: The error occurs because n8n attempts to hold too much data in memory during the execution of a workflow that processes a large CSV file. When the workflow tries to finalize, it exceeds the maximum string length that can be handled, leading to a crash.
fix_steps: Create a subworkflow to handle the CSV processing in smaller chunks
Set the subworkflow to 'no save' to avoid excessive logging
Test the workflow with a manageable chunk size, such as 10,000 lines
agent_instruction: Implement a subworkflow to process the CSV in smaller chunks and set it to 'no save'.
